title: macOS local model runtime validation and packaging constraints
blocker_detail: local-stt and local-mt features compile successfully on macos-14 (aarch64) in CI matrix (see ci.yml linux-local-stt and linux-local-mt allowed-fail jobs). However, runtime model loading, Metal/CoreML path testing, and packaging constraint validation require model files and macOS hardware with actual audio I/O — not available in CI.

compilation_status.local_stt_macos14: CI allowed-fail job verifies compile; no runtime test
compilation_status.local_mt_macos14: CI allowed-fail job verifies compile; no runtime test

deferred_test_cases.evidence: CI allowed-fail compile job passes on macos-14 (see ci.yml)
CI allowed-fail compile job passes on macos-14 (see ci.yml)

deferred_test_cases.description: Model cache path created under ~/Library/Application Support
deferred_test_cases.reason: Requires macOS runtime with model file download

deferred_test_cases.description: Metal/CoreML path: use accelerated path or document CPU fallback
deferred_test_cases.reason: Requires macOS hardware with Metal support and ONNX Runtime GPU build

deferred_test_cases.description: Packaging constraints: model and native library inclusion verified
deferred_test_cases.reason: Requires full macOS release artifact build with models

prerequisites: REL-01 macOS packaging script in place (done via scripts/package-macos.sh)
macOS machine with Xcode and model download capability

notes: Compilation gates pass via CI. Runtime validation deferred to hardware access. Metal/CoreML acceleration is Phase 6 scope — CPU fallback is the Phase 5 baseline.
